name: AI Pathfinder & Replay Export
description: Asynchronous AI pathfinder that simulates GD 2.2 physics at 240 TPS and exports replays to .gdr2 format compatible with Eclipse Menu.

tps.name: Simulation TPS
tps.description: Ticks per second for physics simulation

max-attempts.name: Max Pathfinding Attempts
max-attempts.description: Maximum simulation attempts before giving up

look-ahead-frames.name: Look-Ahead Frames
look-ahead-frames.description: How many frames ahead to evaluate safety
